Hey, what's going on guys? I just wanted to give you a quick overview before the overview of the group pitch. So this whole sales section is the next kind of evolution of selling since it's just more leveraged. If you can accomplish in one hour what would take you normally four hours, then you are accomplishing a lot. And if you can do the same thing with your employee, then you get three more hours of productivity from that same person and there's less effort overall. So the next video kind of dives deep into why group selling is kind of the next natural step. But I wanted to make this video just to sort of qualify the fact that group selling can be used. The pitch that is going to follow this is the normal cashback script. There is one section at the end that has updates to that after having released that and some of the feedback that we had and some of the improvements that some of the other gym owners put together that were sweet and just tightened up everything. And just kind of everything is more or less the same from beginning to end. The only things that change are the clothes. So clothes number one is your normal cashback clothes. Clothes number two is going to be your credit only clothes. And then clothes number three is the green bribe which do you prefer EFT play. That clothes is inside of the green bribe plate since that's what we're kind of talking about that whole time. Like it made more sense to keep it there. But you would tack on that those closing slides right after that if that's the clothes that you wanted to use. So the first huge bit of the sale, the presale and then all of the slides in between with the insertion of Josh Pond's qualification questions to overcome any obstacles at that kind of like one third endpoint all the way until they've made all the agreements that they're committed to doing everything. And at that point is when it's close one to a three. So everything at that point is more or less the same and the closes just have some small differentiators. So I just wanted to clarify that before we launch into the group selling because it actually it works for whatever you're selling. It's more or less just a visual version of the script that we all have come to know and look. So hope that makes sense. Rock and roll.
